description_long: This is a two-toned ceramic cup with a white upper half and an orange lower half, featuring a distinct, ornate handle on one side. The cup sits on a matching orange saucer, which itself rests on a larger, flat, purple circular mat. The cup has a wide opening and a smooth, glossy finish, with a noticeable notch or cutout on one side of the rim. The handle is elegantly curled, providing a comfortable grip. There are small textured metallic-looking pads on the saucer and mat, possibly for anti-slip or decorative purposes. The overall design is modern and visually striking, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A modern, two-toned cup with a curled handle, sitting on an orange saucer and a purple mat, featuring a rim notch and metallic-textured pads.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate handle, rim notch, and the layered saucer and mat beneath the cup.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle and the full circular shape of the cup and saucer.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle in profile and the rim notch visible, emphasizing the cup's two-tone color scheme.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rim notch directly, with the handle on the far side and the metallic-textured pad on the saucer clearly visible.
